The '''Raich's cave''' was a cavern located within the [[Dead Forest (Endor)|Dead Forest]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The location served as the base of operations for the [[Raich]], who housed a number of animals there. The animals were tied in place and fed [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] until the Raich decided to devour them. The Raich was first defeated outside his cave by [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. The Ewok warriors were able to track the beast to his lair and eventually trapped him in the form of a tree using a [[magic cap]].

The [[Bordok/Legends|bordok]] [[Baga]] was once trapped within the Raich's cave, during the [[Raich crisis|temporary return]] of the Raich, but he was eventually freed by the Ewoks [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]]. After the eventual defeat of the Raich, the animals were freed from the cave.
